subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. von Lilenthal, spoken on 1913-11-22
subcodes.first_line: There are souls who are capable of becoming quickened by the Divine Fragrance and the statement of His Holiness Christ in regard to the second birth applies to them
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @attaining the life of the spirit, @The Holy Spirit, @knowledge; recognition of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @the human soul
